utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , hey , Mon , do you still have your like old blouses and dresses from high school ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah , I think I have some around here somewhere . Why ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , it is just that maternity clothes are so expensive .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , Rach ! I made a pile of your stuff over on this side of the room . If you could just ... throw your purses at it .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God , are you out of a job ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , but they stuck me in personal shopping , which is just a huge step down !

emotion_cause.span: 7_they stuck me in personal shopping , which is just a huge step down !
